title: limonium serotinum
intro:
Limonium serotinum, also known as Sea Lavender or Statice, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and silvery-gray foliage.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes.

The health benefits of Limonium serotinum include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections and promote wound healing.

The herbal preparations of Limonium serotinum include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, or ingested as a calming tea to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
